source: WebSearch(google) + WebFetch fallback (LinkedIn/Glassdoor/direct career pages returned 403; confirmed via au.gradconnection.com, lifeatcanva.com search snippets, jobs.generalcatalyst.com)

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — AI Evaluation Platform
jobs.why: Canva 4月放出的 AI Evaluation Platform Senior MLE 岗位；负责构建衡量 Canva 所有 AI 功能质量的评测基础设施（LLM-as-judge、RAG 评估体系）；AU 本土独角兽，AI 战略核心团队，学员当前不一定够得着，但目标感强。

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 Graduate — Australia & New Zealand
jobs.why: Atlassian Grad++ Program 明确面向无正式工作经验的应届生（AU/NZ PR 或公民）；工作内容是 LLM fine-tuning 和 GenAI 产品（与 Bootcamp Phase 3 项目高度吻合）；Bootcamp 毕业生完成 Phase 3 LLM 项目后可直接投。

jobs.tierLabel: 特殊机会 · PhD Graduate Program
jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 PhD Graduate — Australia & New Zealand
jobs.why: Atlassian 2026 PhD 研究生专项通道，针对 PhD 候选人（Jan–Jun 2026 预计毕业）开放的独立申请路径；在读博士身份可申，入职门槛低于正式岗位，是 PhD 学员加速转行 AI 工程的最短路径。

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — Content ML
alternativeCandidates.note: Canva Content ML team (search ranking, recommendations, content understanding); same seniority as aspirational pick but different product focus.

alternativeCandidates.title: Staff Machine Learning Engineer — Product Insight Enablement
alternativeCandidates.note: Staff-level (above Senior) Canva MLE; ML infrastructure and product analytics focus. Strong target for learners 5+ years post-bootcamp.

alternativeCandidates.title: Staff / Lead Platform Engineer (ML & AI) — REQ245957
alternativeCandidates.note: CommBank is ranked #1 APAC for AI maturity (Evident AI Index 2025); mid-senior ML platform role. Strong employer brand for fintech-track learners.

alternativeCandidates.title: Engineering Manager — Enterprise AI Solution Enablement
alternativeCandidates.note: Senior people-manager + AI engineering hybrid; Macquarie's AI team building enterprise LLM solutions. Good aspirational benchmark for learners 5+ years out targeting financial services.

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — AI Enablement
alternativeCandidates.note: Canva AI Platform group, AI Enablement team (MLOps / internal AI tooling skew). Listed in prior day alternatives; verify still open.

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer Graduate, Trust and Safety Engineering — 2026 Start
alternativeCandidates.note: Rolling intake — strong actionable pick for Phase 4 NLP project graduates; verify open status.

alternativeCandidates.title: AI Engineer
alternativeCandidates.note: ASX-listed AU fintech (revenue $250M+); small AI team, high ownership. Good 6–12 month post-bootcamp target.

alternativeCandidates.title: Associate Machine Learning Engineer
alternativeCandidates.note: ASX-listed AU proptech (#1 real estate platform); associate-level entry at AI Enrichment squad. Strong Melbourne-based actionable target.

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern 2026/27 (Dec 2026 – Feb 2027)
alternativeCandidates.note: Applications closed May 1 2026; monitor Canva careers for 2027/28 intern program opening (~Aug 2026). 12-week full-time summer program.
